findings.title: No CSRF protection on REST API
findings.description: The MikroTik REST API does not use CSRF tokens for state-changing operations. Since it uses HTTP Basic Auth, browsers automatically attach credentials on cross-origin requests unless CORS is restrictive.

findings.title: Missing critical security headers
findings.description: The following security headers are missing across all checked endpoints: Content-Security-Policy, Strict-Transport-Security, X-Content-Type-Options. This leaves the web interface vulnerable to clickjacking, MIME sniffing, and other client-side attacks.

findings.title: DOM-based XSS sinks present in WebFig JavaScript
findings.description: The following DOM XSS sinks were found in WebFig's client-side JavaScript: location.hash, location.href_assign, window.name. Manual review recommended to determine exploitability.
